title: Korean Daily Life Vlog | Learn Real Korean Expressions

cues.text: It's Friday morning.
I just woke up.
First, I draw vertical blinds.
Then sunlight comes in.
I ran the washing machine yesterday.
Hello.
I just woke up and my face is puffy 😂 Please understand.
I've been folding laundry since this morning.
Everything is dry.
It smells good too.
(The alarm is ringing 🎶)
The alarm that I set just in case went off.
So today, like this my day!
Going to work and coming home something that might be ordinary but might not be so ordinary
I’m trying to capture my daily life but...
First, I need to wash up!
I usually don't take a shower in the morning; I just wash my hair and face and go out.
I usually take a shower at night.
And you might not have seen it much in the video, but I actually wear glasses.
My eyesight isn't great, so I wear glasses when I work or go outside,
and when I have a shoot like today or an important appointment,
I wear contact lenses.
I think I've been wearing contact lenses since college.
So I'm very used to it.
I can put it on even with my eyes closed.
Ah, I can't put it on with my eyes closed.
I dried my hair completely, and I have very straight hair.
So I use a hair iron like this.
You can see that it has a bit of a curl, right?
So some days I do it well and my hair looks really nice, and other days I fail it
so it looks really weird.
I'm going to have breakfast now.
Shake the soy milk a bit and cut the edge with scissors.
If you just pour it here, it doesn't come out very well.
So if you make a hole for the straw, So if you make a hole for the straw,
air can enter here, and it comes out much better.
What a tip, right?
I put oatmeal, creatine, and blueberries.
I like my eggs fully cooked, like this.
They have a dry taste.
People who like soft-boiled eggs say they can't eat them because they're too dry.
I boil eggs regularly.
I boil 15 eggs each time.
I take 3 eggs a day.
So after taking them for 5 days, I boil another 15 eggs and that's how I eat them.
I eat breakfast and then do the dishes right away.
Ah... no way!
There's no water coming out right now.
They said they would replace the water pipes.
This is actually the view in front of my house.
But I heard it was supposed to be done by yesterday.
Hmm...
I guess it'll probably come out in the evening?
I think I need to continue doing the dishes then.
I've put on all my clothes and I'm a bit late, so I'll head out quickly.
Even if you're in a hurry, you should wear shoes.
The weather is really, really nice.
It's my shadow.
I've arrived at the subway station.
"Young Adult"
I listen to music or read books on the subway.
Today, I will read a book.
But since I'm filming, I can't concentrate on the book 😅
I cross the Han River twice every day.
When going to work and coming home.
If you don't look out the window during these times, you're missing out.
I have arrived at the office.
First, I fill my water bottle.
Then, I went out to have a meeting with Kyeong-eun.
Oh, the weather is nice today, right?
I got my hair cut...
Oh, that's right. It's a bit awkward right now.
This is the first time I've seen your haircut today.
I got mine done last week.
and I wanted to try this perm at least once.
But I'm not feeling brave, you know.
This time, the person who is doing my hair told me,
"Be brave. Let's give it a try."
"I think it will suit you well."
She kept saying things like that.
So I gathered my courage for the first time, but I'm slightly regretting it. Are you regretting it?
But today our clothes are really...
Oh! That's right!
The colors red and blue They go really well together, don't they? They really do.
Hello! Hello.
I would like a warm Americano.
There are two types of Americano beans. I'll go with the nutty flavor.
The nutty flavor?
I would like an iced decaf Americano, please.
Are you going to drink it here? Yes. / Yes.
I will help you with the payment of 10,800 won. Yes.
We had a meeting at the cafe for about an hour.
It's very important, so it's a secret 🤭
I'm going back to the office.
Lunch is at 1 PM, but I still have about 2 hours, so I'll work a bit before going to eat.
The weather is so nice that it would be great to go for a walk.
I wanted to shoot a scene like this.
But you have to come back to get the camera 😂 I returned to the office.
But.
I suddenly got a message.
It’s Sohee who is my coworker.
Hang out after work?
Oh! That sounds good!
I suddenly have a dinner appointment.
But you should eat lunch first, right?
What are you eating?
We still...
We don't know.
I'm going to OO restaurant, anyone want to join?
You're going to film it! LOL You don't have to appear. I'm just going to take only myself.
Then, you eat with this camera set up?
Yes.
Wow...
What title will it go up on the TTMIK channel?
A day of a Korean man in his 30s?
(frightened) Is anyone going?
(Running away) Enjoy your meal!
Please give me one Jeyuk-deopbap. Jeyuk-deopbap, alright.
These days, I'm learning the piano, so when I eat alone like this, since you eat quickly
I use the leftover lunch time to practice piano.
Be careful, it's hot.
Yes. Thank you.
It's Jeyuk-deopbap. You can mix it with rice.
Thank you.
Excuse me, do you have an apron?
Oh, yes. I'll bring you an apron. I'm sorry.
Thank you.
You might get food on your clothes while eating.
So I put on an apron.
I usually drink the soup first.
And I eat banchan with chopsticks.
Would you like a little more banchan?
I'm good. Thank you.
Do you need a receipt?
That's okay. Thank you.
Thank you. I enjoyed the meal. Thank you. Goodbye.
I'm going to the piano practice room now.
On the way, I saw flowers and a building covered in ivy.
I also saw the construction work, which reminded me of my house,
and it reminded me of the dishes I couldn't do because water doesn't come out.
While thinking about doing the dishes I have arrived at the piano practice room.
There are several rooms like this.
7 or 8 years old? At that time I briefly learned piano.
I hadn't played until now, but I started (again) 2 weeks ago.
My skills are still lacking a lot, but I'm practicing hard and enjoying it.
I returned to the office.
And I started the afternoon work.
I've been quite busy with work today.
I'm checking the video subtitles.
I look strange wearing a headset.
I pour the water into a cup and drink it.
You all should have a glass of water too.
"Give me water too!"
This is a plant that I'm growing, and I think it would be perfect to water it today.
It's been about 2 or 3 years since I started growing it.
It used to be really long, but I trimmed it.
I'm going to the bathroom to water it.
The water pressure in the bathroom is too strong, so I carefully water it with a cup.
I'll leave it on the balcony for a while until the water drains a bit.
Get some sunlight and fresh air.
Would you like to see the view?
Wow...
So when I'm working and feel a bit stuffy or sleepy,
I come out and see the outside, and it's really nice.
The sunset here is really beautiful.
These are sunsets I took myself.
Really! I took them myself!
I'm discussing the video with the PD sitting next to me.
It looks really serious.
I didn't fight with the PD.
I eat nuts as a snack.
It tastes best when you eat it all in one bite.
I finished my work today.
Now I'm going to the dinner gathering.
Do you have plans for the weekend?
Organizing the house.
Organizing the house? / Yes.
I organize every day.
Because I moved recently. / Oh, because you moved.
Are you filming? / Yes.
Aha!
I'm going to put this in!
Do you want to say hello?
Hello.
TTMIK subscribers.
We had a lot of fun conversations and ate a lot of delicious food.
Bye!
I'm leaving first. / Bye!
Thank you. Have a good one!
Have a good one!
I'm leaving home first.
I wanted to show you some conversations with my coworkers, but it was noisy
and the table was a bit small to set down the camera.
So I only recorded a short clip.
This is my first time filming a vlog at night.
The night air is cool, there aren't many people around, and it's dark.
Let's cross the Han River again.
The night view is really beautiful.
I wanted to pet the puppy, but I held back.
I've returned to Home Sweet Home.
I hang clothes on the hanger.
I take a shower while listening to music.
I really love Red Hot Chili Peppers🌶️
I apply lotion and do a face mask.
Sneeze...
didn't come out.
Ah!
Right. The dishes.
I was a bit flustered for a moment, but I finished quickly.
I wipe the bathroom dry after showering.
Because I don't want to live with mold.
I change to warm and dim lighting.
So my day has ended.
What should I film next?
If you have a good idea, please let me know in the comments.
I'm sleepy.
I'm going to go to bed now.
Good night!
